basic_details.job_title: BSNL General Manager Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Bharat Sanchar Nigam Limited (BSNL) has officially announced the General Manager in Finance & Accounts Recruitment 2026 with 15 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official BSNL website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 50 years and hold a Chartered Accountant (CA), Cost & Management Accountant (CMA), MBA (Finance), or PG Diploma in Management (Finance) qualification can now submit their online applications. The application process will remain open until 24-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 50 years as on the closing date of submission of application. No age relaxation details are provided in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Chartered Accountant (CA), Cost & Management Accountant (CMA), MBA (Finance), or PG Diploma in Management (Finance)
qualification.details: General Manager in Finance & Accounts: Chartered Accountant (CA) Cost & Management Accountant (CMA) MBA (Finance) from a recognized university/institution PG Diploma in Management (Finance) from a recognized university/institution Experience: More than 15 years of post-qualification work experience in Executive/ Management grade in the Finance and Accounts domain including at least 5 years in Senior Executive/Managerial level of DGM and above, in listed companies or high-turnover firms with 3 years average turnover of Rs.3000 Crores or above supported by audited financial statements or credible documentary evidence.

salary_details.details: Monthly remuneration: Rs. 2,25,000/- (Rupees Two Lakh Twenty Five Thousand only) Annual increment: 5% (five percent) Consolidated remuneration, no Dearness Allowance or other additional allowances. Entitled to a residential Service Telephone Connection and a vehicle for official purposes. Ineligible for further facilities, including residential accommodation or medical reimbursement. No entitlement to pensionary benefits or post-retirement medical facilities. No pay protection, financial benefit or service-related advantage from previous employment.

selection_process: and qualifications (Stage-I) Group Discussion and Presentation (Stage-II) Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BSNL General Manager in Finance & Accounts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BSNL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BSNL General Manager in Finance & Accounts recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BSNL General Manager in Finance & Accounts positions is 24th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Chartered Accountants (CA), Cost & Management Accountants (CMA), or hold an MBA (Finance) or PG Diploma in Management (Finance) from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the General Manager in Finance & Accounts post is 50 years as of the application closing date.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the General Manager in Finance & Accounts post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 15 vacancies for the General Manager in Finance & Accounts positions announced by BSNL.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for this contractual role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated monthly remuneration of Rs. 2,25,000/- with a 5% annual increment.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, an application fee of Rs. 1000/- is applicable for all categories of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the BSNL General Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, followed by a Group Discussion and Presentation, and finally an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for contractual positions of General Manager in Finance & Accounts within BSNL.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need more than 15 years of post-qualification work experience in the Finance and Accounts domain, with at least 5 years in a senior managerial level (DGM and above).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article, along with a link to the official BSNL website.
